compiled_state.title: CI-shellcheck: SC2140 in validate-issues.sh and SC2254 in pre-commit-review-gate.sh -> CI ShellCheck job fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
CI ShellCheck job fails with 2 warnings (treated as errors at --severity=warning):

1. plugins/dso/scripts/validate-issues.sh line 190: SC2140 — Word is of the form A"B"C in a comment line about normalizing v3 child_of
2. plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh line 295: SC2254 — Quote expansions in case patterns to match literally rather than as a glob (uses ${_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH} in a case pattern)

## Expected Behavior
ShellCheck passes with zero warnings at --severity=warning level.

## Actual Behavior
2 warnings cause the ShellCheck CI job to exit 1.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), ShellCheck job.
